# GroundWork LLM Knowledge Index

This file indexes the canonical documentation for GroundWork to optimize agent discovery and context loading.

- [GroundWork Product Brief](docs/product-brief.md): The executive summary of GroundWork — capabilities, constraints, and what is in vs. out of scope.
- [How We Work](src/docs/ways-of-working/how-we-work.md): The philosophical foundation — Upfront Technical Delivery, the two-mode lifecycle, and the Operating Contract.
- [Lifecycle Index](docs/lifecycle/index.md): How the Setup, Delivery Loop, and Maintenance layers fit together.
- [Greenfield Setup](docs/lifecycle/01-setup.md): The one-time six-phase pipeline from Product Brief through First Bet, including the MVP→Bet context-preserving handoff.
- [Delivery Loop](docs/lifecycle/02-delivery-loop.md): The repeating five-phase Bet workflow — Discovery, Design Foundations, Decomposition, Delivery, Validation.
- [Maintenance](docs/lifecycle/03-maintenance.md): How docs stay current — Living Documents during bets, `groundwork-update` for surgical patches, `groundwork-check` for CI drift detection.
